qrcode.title: QR Code
qrcode.desc: Waad daabacan kartaa oo ku dhejin kartaa koodhkan QR shayga. Marka la sawiro, si toos ah ayuu ugu jihaysan yahay boggan.

items.subtitle: Gali faahfaahinta shayga
items.load_error: Ku fashilmay in la raro shayga

form.name: Magaca Shayga
form.location_placeholder: Raadso ama ku dar goob cusub...
form.location_help: Xagee qolkan ku yaal? (tusaale: 'Saarka sare ee armaajada buluuga ah')
form.location_public: Qof walba wuu arki karaa goobtan
form.location_empty: Ma jiro goob weli oo qolkan lagu qeexay. Bilow qorista si aad mid u abuurto.
form.visibility_public: Waxay u muuqataa dhammaan xubnaha guriga

messages.quick_add_success: ✓ "{{barcode}}" si degdeg ah ayaa loo daray - waad wax ka beddeli kartaa markii dambe
messages.quick_add_fail: ⚠ Ku darista degdega ah waa la guuldareystay
messages.not_found: ⚠ Alaabta laguma helin xogta. Waxaad ka raadin kartaa Google.
messages.name_required: Magaca shaygu waa loo baahan yahay
messages.location_add_error: Ku guuldareystay in la daro goobta

common.copyright: © {{year}} HomeInventory - Dhammaan xuquuqda waa la keydiyay

login.title: Gal
login.subtitle: Maamul dhammaan agabka gurigaaga si caqli leh
login.terms_beta: Nooca BETA: HomeInventory hadda wuxuu ku jiraa marxaladda tijaabada. Ma jirto dammaanad laga bixiyo joogtaynta ama amniga xogtaada.
login.terms_disclaimer: Mas'uuliyadda: Adigoo isticmaalaya codsigan, waxaad oggolaatay inaadan dalban karin wax magdhow ah haddii xog lunto, galitaan dhibaato yeesho, ama qaladaad farsamo dhacaan.
login.terms_backup: Kaydinta Xogta: Waxaan si xoog leh kuugu soo jeedinaynaa inaad si joogto ah u kaydiso macluumaadkaaga muhiimka ah.
login.terms_accept: Markaad gasho, waxaa loo arkaa inaad aqbashay shuruudahaan.

register.title: Ku soo dhawoow HomeInventory
register.subtitle: Abuur akoon cusub ama ku biir guri horey u jiray
register.create_house_desc: 🏠 Guri cusub ayaa la abuuri doonaa waxaadna heli doontaa Furaha Guriga gaarka ah. La wadaag furahan qoyska si aad uga wada gashaan isla inventory-ga.
register.join_house_desc: 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Geli Furaha Guriga laguu soo bandhigay si aad ugu biirto guri hore u jiray. Qof kasta oo haysta furaha wuu geli karaa inventory-ga la wadaago.
register.password_confirm_placeholder: Mar kale geli furaha sirta ah
register.house_key_placeholder: Ku dhaji furaha guriga oo ka kooban 64 xaraf
register.password_length: Furaha waa inuu ahaadaa ugu yaraan 6 xaraf
register.key_required: Furaha Guriga ayaa loo baahan yahay si aad ugu biirto guri jira

key_created.title: 🎉 Guriga Waa La Abuuray!
key_created.subtitle: Ku keydi furaha hoose meel ammaan ah
key_created.warning: Muhiim: Furahan waxaa la tusayaa hal mar oo kaliya. La wadaag xubnaha qoyska si ay u heli karaan isla kaydkaas.

email_verification.title: 📧 Xaqiijinta Email-ka waa Loo Baahan Yahay
email_verification.message: Akoonka waa la abuuray! Fadlan xaqiiji ciwaanka email-kaaga si aad u gasho.
email_verification.step_1: Waxaan u dirnay email xaqiijin ah <1>{{email}}</1>.
email_verification.step_2: Guji badhanka <1>"Xaqiiji Akoontigayga"</1> ee ku jira email-ka.
email_verification.spam_note: Hubi galka spam/junk haddii email-ku uusan imaan.
email_verification.key_note: Muhiim: Furaha gurigaaga sidoo kale waxaa lagu soo diray email-ka. Waxaad la wadaagi kartaa xubnaha qoyska.

forgot_password.title: Ma Xasuusataa Erayga Sirta ah
forgot_password.subtitle: Bilow hab soo celin ammaan ah si aad mar labaad u gasho akoonkaaga.
forgot_password.email_success: Haddii akoon jiro, xiriir loogu talagalay dib u dejinta erayga sirta ah oo shaqaynaya 15 daqiiqo ayaa la soo diray.
forgot_password.recovery_mode_info: Email-ka waa la naafoobay server-kan. Sii wad adigoo isticmaalaya Furaha Soo Celinta ee aad kaydsatay inta aad samaynaysay akoonka.
forgot_password.confirm_password_placeholder: Dib u geli eraygaaga sirta ah
forgot_password.reset_submit: Dib u Deji Erayga Sirta ah

reset_password.title: Dib u Deji Erayga Sirta ah
reset_password.subtitle: Isticmaal xiriirka ammaan ah si aad u dejiso eray sir cusub.
reset_password.missing_token: Xiriirka dib-u-dejinta erayga sirta ah wuxuu u muuqdaa mid aan dhammeystirnayn ama jaban.
reset_password.confirm_password_placeholder: Dib u geli eraygaaga sirta ah

recovery_setup.title: Abuuri Furaha Soo-kabashada
recovery_setup.subtitle: Illaa tan la dhameystiro, lama tixgelinayo in akoonkaagu uu amaan yahay si loogu soo kabsado erayga sirta ah ee maxalliga ah.
recovery_setup.warning: Furaashan waxaa la muujin doonaa hal mar oo kaliya. Ku keydi maamulaha erayga sirta ah ama meel kale oo ammaan ah oo offline ah.
recovery_setup.account: Furaha soo kabashada ayaa loo abuuri doonaa akoonka {{username}}.
recovery_setup.description: Sababta oo ah email-ka waa la naafoobay, mustaqbalka waxaad isticmaali doontaa furahaan oo kaliya si aad u cusbooneysiiso eraygaaga sirta ah.

recovery_key_modal.reset_title: Keydi Furahaaga Cusub ee Soo Kabashada
recovery_key_modal.settings_title: Keydi Furahaaga Cusub ee Soo Kabashada
recovery_key_modal.subtitle: Furaashan waa la muujiyay hal mar oo keliya.
recovery_key_modal.warning: Haddii aad lumiso furaashan iyadoo email-ka naafo yahay, waxaa laga yaabaa inaadan awoodin inaad dib u hesho eraygaaga sirta ah. Koobi oo kaydi si ammaan ah.

auth.password_requirements: U isticmaal ugu yaraan {{min}} xaraf oo leh xarfo waaweyn, xarfo yar, nambar, iyo calaamad.

filters.no_items: Alaab ma jirto oo sifeeyahan ku habboon

categories.title: Qaybaha
categories.empty: Wali wax shay ah lama darin

beta_banner.title: BETA:
beta_banner.text: HomeInventory hadda waxaa lagu jiraa marxaladda tijaabada iyo hiwaayadda. Lama hubo sii jiridda xogta ama amniga. Fadlan kaydso macluumaadka muhiimka ah.

messages.import_invalid_format: Qaabka faylka kaydka waa mid aan sax ahayn
messages.import_success: ✅ {{items}} shay, {{categories}} qayb, {{rooms}} qolal, {{locations}} goobood ayaa lagu daray.
messages.password_changed: Erayga sirta ah si guul leh ayaa loo beddelay!
messages.password_error_current: Erayga sirta ah ee hadda ma saxna
messages.password_error_invalid: Xog aan sax ahayn ayaa la diray
messages.session_expired: Kal-fadhigu wuu dhacay. Fadlan mar kale soo gal.
messages.connection_error: Lama xiriiri karo server-ka. Fadlan hubi xiriirkaaga internet-ka.
messages.unexpected_error: Qalad aan la fileyn ayaa dhacay
messages.username_changed: ✅ Magaca isticmaale si guul leh ayaa loo beddelay!
messages.username_len_error: Magaca isticmaale waa inuu ahaadaa ugu yaraan 3 xaraf
messages.password_min_len: Eray-bixin cusub waa inuu ahaadaa ugu yaraan 6 xaraf

messages.request_approved: ✅ Codsiga ku biirista waa la oggolaaday

my_houses.title: Guryahayga
my_houses.no_house: Weli ma aadan ka mid ahayn wax guri ah
my_houses.info: 💡 Waxaad noqon kartaa xubin ka tirsan dhowr guri oo aad dhex bedeli kartaa. Guriga kasta wuxuu leeyahay keyd gaar ah.

house_info.title: Furaha Guriga Firfircoon
house_info.share_info: 💡 Isticmaalayaasha aad la wadaagto furahan waxay awood u leeyihiin inay galaan keydkaaga adigoo isticmaalaya ikhtiyaarka "Ku Biir Guriga" inta lagu jiro diiwaangelinta.
house_info.invite_desc: La wadaag furaha guriga si xubnaha qoyska ay u galaan isla keydka. Xubin kasta wuxuu galayaa akoonkiisa laakiin wuxuu helayaa isla xogta.

security.title: Amniga
security.change_password_desc: Cusbooneysii eraygaaga sirta ah ee akoonka
security.recovery_key_desc: Waxaad abuuri kartaa fure cusub si aad u soo kabato eraygaaga sirta ah ee deegaanka.
security.recovery_key_missing: Ma jiro fure soo-kabasho oo muuqda oo akoonkani leeyahay weli.
security.recovery_key_unavailable: Furaha soo-kabashada hadda laguma muujin karo. Dib u soo saar haddii loo baahdo.
security.recovery_key_modal_desc: Xaqiiji eraygaaga sirta ah ee hadda si aad u sii wadato. Fure cusub waxa kaliya oo la muujin doonaa hal mar.

join_house.title: Ku Biir Guriga
join_house.key_help: Geli furaha aad ka heshay xubnaha qoyskaaga

create_house.title: Abuur Guri Cusub
create_house.name_help: Haddii la daayo madhan, waxaa lagu magacaabi doonaa "Gurigayga Cusub"
create_house.info: ℹ️ Qaybaha iyo qolalka aasaasiga ah ayaa loo sameyn doonaa guriga cusub. Waxaad dib u hagaajin kartaa markasta.

username.title: Beddel Magaca Isticmaalaha
username.help: 3-30 xaraf, xarfo, nambarro, hoos-u-dhigis iyo dash kaliya

inventory.title: Hantida
inventory.subtitle: {{count}} shay ayaa la helay
inventory.empty_filter: Ma jiraan shay ku habboon shaandhadaada
inventory.empty_msg: Lama darin wax shay ah ilaa hadda
inventory.delete_confirm: Ma hubtaa inaad rabto inaad tirtirto shaygan?

users.confirm_ban: Ma hubtaa inaad rabto inaad {{status}} isticmaalahaan?
users.confirm_delete_1: Ma hubtaa inaad rabto inaad tirtirto isticmaale "{{username}}"?
users.confirm_delete_2: ⚠️ DIGTOON: Tani waxay SI JOOGTO ah u tirtiri doontaa DHAMMAAN xogta (inventories, qolalka, qaybaha) ee isticmaale "{{username}}"!
users.confirm_delete_3: 🚨 DIGTOONTA UGU DAMBAYSA: Akoonka "{{username}}" iyo dhammaan xogta si aan LOO SOO CELIN karin ayaa la tirtiri doonaa. Ma rabtaa inaad sii wadato?

logs.title: Diiwaanka Maamulaha
logs.no_errors: // Nidaamku waa caafimaad, ma jiro wax diiwaan khaladaad ah.

email.title: Dir E-mail
email.subject: Cinwaan
email.success: E-mail si guul leh ayaa loo diray!

hero.description: Ka dhig liiska gurigaaga mid dijitaal ah. Qaybi alaabta, casuumo qoyska, oo ka gal meel kasta. Casri ah, ammaan ah, oo fudud in la isticmaalo.

features.title: Maxay <1>HomeInventory</1> u tahay?
features.subtitle: Dhamaan astaamaha si ay u fududeeyaan maareynta guriga hal madal gudaheeda

categorize.title: Qaybi Alaabta
categorize.desc: Qaabee dhammaan alaabta iyadoo loo eegayo qolalka iyo qaybaha, hel waxa aad u baahan tahay ilbiriqsiyo gudaheed.

family.title: Casuumo Qoyska oo leh Furaha Guriga
family.desc: Ku casuum xubnaha qoyska adiga oo adeegsanaya furahaaga guriga ee gaarka ah, isla maaree agabka.

access.title: Helitaanka Meel Kasta
access.desc: Guriga, shaqada, ama fasaxa - si ammaan ah u hel agabkaaga meel kasta.

barcode.title: Ku Dar Si Degdeg ah Barcode
barcode.desc: Scanner xudduudaha badeecada, faahfaahin si toos ah ayaa loo buuxiyaa.

security.title: Ammaan iyo Asturan
security.desc: Xogtaada waa la siray oo waa la ilaaliyaa iyadoo la adeegsanayo kaabayaasha u hoggaansama KVKK.

backup.title: Gurmad & Dhoofin
backup.desc: Gurmad agabkaaga qaab JSON ah, dib u soo celi goorta aad rabto.

cta_bottom.title: Bilaaw Isticmaalka Hadda!
cta_bottom.description: Abuur akoon bilaash ah oo dijitaali guri agabkaaga. Diiwaangelintu waxay qaadataa kaliya dhowr ilbiriqsi.

footer.desc: Madal sahlan oo ammaan ah si aad u dijitaali guri agabkaaga.
footer.copyright: © {{year}} HomeInventory. Dhammaan xuquuqda waa la ilaaliyaa.

landing.preview_privacy_notice: Arag demo: ma jiro xog isticmaale dhab ah oo la soo bandhigay.

inventory.title: Kaydinta alaabta
inventory.content: Halkan waxaad ku dari kartaa oo ku liisan kartaa alaabtaada. Dabagal alaabta guriga oo dhan hal meel!

house_key.title: Furaha Guriga
house_key.content: Kan waa furahaaga guriga, isticmaal si aad dadka kale u casuunto. Ku dar xubnaha qoyska gurigaaga!

categories.title: Qaybaha
categories.content: Habeey alaabtaada adigoo kala saaraya. Elektroonig, alaabta guriga, jikada, iyo in ka badan!

google_house_select.title: Soo Dhawoow!
google_house_select.subtitle: Waxaad gashay adigoo adeegsanaya Google. Hadda dooro guri.
google_house_select.house_name_hint: Haddii la dhaafo, waxaa magaciisu noqon doonaa "Gurigayga"
google_house_select.house_key_hint: Gali furaha 64-astaamaha ah ee aad ka heshay xubin qoys

scanner.title: Qalabka Baakadka Barcode
scanner.permission_error: Ogolaanshaha kaamirada waa la diiday. Hubi dejimaha biraawsarka.
scanner.busy_error: Kaamiradu mashquul tahay. Xir barnaamijyada kale.
scanner.qr_hint: Isku hagaaji QR code-ka gudaha sanduuqa
scanner.found_local_msg: Barcode-kan hore ayaa ku jira keydkaaga.
scanner.quick_add: Ku dar si degdeg ah (Wax ka bedel Mar dambe)
scanner.zoom_hint: 💡 Kordhi isku dheelitirka si aad u caddeyso oo telefoonka haysta si deggan
scanner.found_item_redirect: Shay la helay! Waxaa loo gudbinayaa...
scanner.found_page_redirect: Bog la helay! Waxaa loo gudbinayaa...
scanner.invalid_qr: Koodhkan QR-ga ma aha midka app-kan loogu talagalay.
scanner.not_found: Alaabta lama helin. Isku day barcode kale.

item_qr.hint_mobile: 📱 Ka sawir koodhkan QR taleefankaaga si aad u gasho sheyga si dhakhso leh
item_qr.usage_desc: Daabac koodhka QR oo ku dheji sheyga. Ka sawir taleefankaaga si aad si degdeg ah ugu gasho boggan!

messages.join_success: Codsigaaga ku biirista waxaa la diray
messages.join_error: Ma diri karin codsi ku biirista

no_house.title: Ma ku xiran tahay guri hadda
no_house.description: Samee guri cusub ama u dir codsi ku biirista mid hore.

create.title: Abuur guri cusub
create.description: Bilow liiska gurigaaga oo isla markiiba sii wad.

join.title: Dir Codsi Soo Biirid
join.description: Geli furaha guriga oo si toos ah ugu dir codsiga milkiilaha guriga.
